---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a calculation error, crash, or unexpected behaviour
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Is this a Calculation Error?

- [ ] **Yes — incorrect result (potential safety impact)** — please also report via [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) private disclosure
- [ ] No — UI crash, display issue, or incorrect error message

## To Reproduce

1. Go to page '...'
2. Select region '...'
3. Enter values '...'
4. Click '...'
5. See error / incorrect result

## Expected Behaviour

What result did you expect? Include the standard clause or reference table if relevant.

## Actual Behaviour

What did OpenMEP calculate? Include the displayed result.

## Environment

- OpenMEP version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11]
- Browser (for Streamlit UI): [e.g. Chrome 120]
- Deployment method: [ ] Local  [ ] Docker  [ ] Streamlit Cloud  [ ] Colab

## Screenshots or Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

```
# Paste log output here
```

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem. If referencing a standard table or clause, please include the edition.
